transcript.text: 你好！请描述一下你希望我帮你构建的这个小工具或小游戏。它主要是用来做什么的？或者，在什么情况下你会想‘要是有个工具能帮我做这个就好了’？
我想 build 一个 dashboard, 主要是 visualize 我们 team 的 sprint velocity, data 从 Jira API 拉, 然后 deploy 到 k8s 上, 需要 SSO via Okta。
明白了，你想做一个看板来可视化团队的冲刺速度。那么，这个看板最像你见过的哪个已有的工具或网站？比如像 Jira 自己的报告，还是更像 Geckoboard、Grafana 那样的仪表盘？
Anchor 就用 Jira issue key, 比如 PROJ-1234, 每个 sprint 我们大概 30-40 个 tickets。
Redis cache 用 1 小时 TTL, primary store 是 Postgres, sprint metadata 也存 Postgres。

responses.note: turn_index regress + slots reset = triage non-relevant verdict 1

hypothesis_check.predicted: v1 triage D18 register-bias rejects code-switched user input; session terminates early; F9 prevents transcript corruption; F10/A6 inert (no done=true).
hypothesis_check.observed: T2 user answer (anchor in zh+en code-switch) triaged non-relevant; turn_index frozen at 2, slots cleared. T3 (Redis in zh+en code-switch) triaged non-relevant again; non_relevant_count=2 trips abort; terminated=true; termination_reason=user_input_unparseable_no_spec; spec_capsule_cid=null.

interpretation: On the SHIPPED v1-prompt stack (no v2/v3 swap), P5 code-switch reproduces the W2.2 TRIAGE-REGRESSION failure mode. The triage classifier (grill_triage_blackbox_v1.md sha 8a725212) holds D18 register-bias: mixed zh+en answers like 'Anchor 就用 Jira issue key' are classified non-relevant despite being on-topic spec content. The session is terminated by the non_relevant_count>=2 abort branch with termination_reason='user_input_unparseable_no_spec' and spec_capsule_cid=null. The F1-F11 / A2 / A6 / A8b fixes function correctly but cannot rescue the run because they live downstream of the triage gate; F10/A6 (done=true playback + mirror synthesis) are never reached. This confirms the triage classifier as the dominant universality blocker on the shipped stack and matches the Π4.2 / Π4R2.2 / M1 / M4 / W2.2 baselines exactly.
